customCommands.name: research-analyze
customCommands.prompt: You are a research assistant. Please provide a detailed analysis of the following academic content, focusing on methodology, results, and implications.
customCommands.description: Analyze research content with research model

customCommands.name: code-explain
customCommands.prompt: Please explain this code in detail, including its purpose, functionality, and any potential improvements.

systemMessage: You are a helpful AI assistant. Use the appropriate model based on the task: research model for paper analysis, general model for coding and reasoning tasks.
